# cycloid_oidc_organization_settings (Resource)

Manage the per-organization OIDC reconciliation settings.
Singleton resource: a single settings row exists per organization.
`oidc_no_match_policy = "eject"` requires `oidc_managed = true`; the API rejects the combination otherwise.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cycloid_oidc_organization_settings" "this" {
  organization           = "my-org"
  default_role_canonical = "member"
  oidc_managed           = true
  oidc_no_match_policy   = "eject"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `oidc_managed` (Boolean) When true, local member/team/invite edits are disabled for the organization (strict mode).
- `oidc_no_match_policy` (String) Policy applied when no group mapping matches on login. `eject` requires `oidc_managed = true`.

### Optional

- `default_role_canonical` (String) Canonical of the org-level role granted to OIDC-managed users on provisioning. Leave unset to configure no default role.
- `organization` (String) Organization canonical where to manage the OIDC settings. Defaults to provider `default_organization`.
